https://tekken.fandom.com/wiki/Emilie_de_Rochefort#Personality

Emilie De Rochefort, better known as Lili, is one of the supporting characters in the Tekken fighting game series. She is the only daughter of Mr. Rochefort, while her mother has never been mentioned in the Tekken series. She resides in a very luxurious suburban mansion with her father, and her butler, Sebastian.
